name: Corporate Practice
summary: Root skill for corporate governance, formation, and organizational legal matters.
content:
# Corporate Practice

This is the parent category for all corporate skills. Corporate work involves entity formation, governance, and organizational structure.

## Sub-areas
- Corporate Formation
- Corporate Governance
- Corporate Finance
- Securities & Capital Markets
- Mergers & Acquisitions
- Venture Capital & Private Equity
- Non-Profit Organizations
- Corporate Dissolution

## Key Principles
- Fiduciary duty awareness
- Shareholder/stakeholder balance
- Compliance with corporate formalities
- Strategic business counsel
- Risk management
